versions.version_description: Complete and readably formatted / two versions (basic/elaborate) / short tabs for intro and verse pattern / suggestions for voicings.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Transpose +3 steps for original key, or capo up 3


Intro:   ( [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] ) x2

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]              [ch]E/D[/ch]
Wait a minute, baby, stay with me awhile[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E/D[/ch]              [ch]F#m/D[/ch]                [ch]E/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch]
Said you'd give me light, but you never told me about the fire[/tab]

Bridge: [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]GM7[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
Drowning in the sea of love, where everyone would love to drown[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]GM7[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
And now it's gone, it doesn't matter what for, when you build your house, then call me, call me[/tab]

Bridge:   ( [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] ) x2   ( [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch] ) x2

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]            [ch]D/E[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m/E[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
And he was just like,     a great dark wing,       within the wings of a storm[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]          [ch]D/E[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
I think I had met my match,               he was singing        [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]      [ch]D/E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
And undoing,                    and undoing            [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]             [ch]D/E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
Ooh, the laces,                     undoing the laces[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]GM7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
     Ooh, Ooh[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]GM7[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Said Sara, you're the poet in my heart, never change, never stop[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
But now it's gone, it doesn't matter what for[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]GM7[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
But when you build your house, you better call me home[/tab]

Bridge:   ( [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] ) x2   ( [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch] ) x2

[tab] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]         [ch]D/E[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m/E[/ch]   [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
Hold on,       the night is coming       and the starling flew for days[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]        [ch]D/E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]       [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
I'd stay home at night,    all the time,     I'd go anywhere,     anywhere anywhere[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]           [ch]D/E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m/E[/ch]       [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
Ask me and I'm there,     yeah,        ask me and I'm there,    'cause I care[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]GM7[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
  In the sea of love, where everyone would love to drown[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]                                [ch]GM7[/ch]
But now it's gone, they say it doesn't matter any more, when you build your house[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
Then please call me, call me[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]GM7[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
Said Sara, you're the poet in my heart, never change, and don't you ever stop[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
And now it's gone, no it doesn't matter anymore[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]GM7[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
When you build your house, I'll come by[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]GM7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Aah, Sara, aah...  (repeat/fade)[/tab]



[tab]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/D[/ch]    [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m/E[/ch]
e-2--4---5--------2--4--5---------------------------
B-3--5---7--------3--5--7---------------------------
G-2--4---6--------2--4--6---------------------------
D-0--0---0------------------------------------------
A---------------------------------------------------
E-----------------0--0--0---------------------------[/tab]
